name: Inside the Dragons Keep
description:
You are standing just inside a nexial portal that leads out onto the
Dragon Village ..  It seems that you have found the lair of the Dragons,
the once-human followers of Goilden Dragon.  Ahead of you stands a steel door
leading into the keep hewn from stone.

exits.description: You see a rusty steel door which leads into the keep.
Below you is the nexial portal that leads into the Dragon Village ..

extra_descriptions.description: The door is made from a set of rusting steel plates set deep into the stone.
